message:
Running command: 
echo "=== OpenROAD exited - checking state $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Check what happened
echo "=== Step 70 directory ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/"

echo ""
echo "=== New steps after 70? ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'

echo ""
echo "=== Final dir? ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL EXISTS!" || echo "No final yet"

echo ""
echo "=== Recent pipe content (last DRT messages) ==="
tail -60 /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null
